channel.title: Piano on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Piano on Compossible

item.title: Solipsism at St Peter’s
item.description:
I tried to sklent

to see if you

were enjoying Joep

as much as I

the Dutch poet

at the pulpit

(in his sanctuary)

striking looking

like an

Old Testament

prophet

I heard the keys

gentle Goliath

struck

to unlock

the magic wooden box

and the sounds drifted up

t’wards heaven

(if they …escape

…the vaulted nave)

I wondered if

we too

are music

trapped vibrations

echoing off the walls

until one day we are
